title: vitis vinifera var. labrusca
intro: Vitis vinifera var. labrusca, also known as the fox grape or labrusca grape, is a type of grapevine native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis vinifera var. labrusca include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
